scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/shared-schema -w packages/tool-api -w packages/acp-core -w packages/git-abstraction -w packages/export-core -w packages/bcm-core -w packages/chat-core -w packages/editor-core -w packages/help-core -w packages/json-forms-ai -w packages/json-forms-core && npm run build -w packages/acp-copilot -w packages/bcm-ai -w packages/runtime && npm run build -w packages/shell-ui -w packages/bcm-ui -w packages/chat-ui -w packages/editor-ui -w packages/help-ui -w packages/json-forms-ui && npm run build -w packages/cli
scripts.install:global: npm run build && cd packages/cli && npm link
scripts.refresh: npm run clean && npm run build && cd packages/cli && npm link
